description: RHDP Lab Foundry - detects lab projects and checks for RHDP skill dependencies

hooks.command: LAB_TYPE=''; if [ -f 'config/instances.yaml' ] && [ -f 'ui-config.yml' ]; then LAB_TYPE='zero-touch'; elif [ -f 'common.yaml' ] && [ -f 'dev.yaml' ]; then LAB_TYPE='agnosticv'; elif [ -f 'ui-config.yml' ] && [ -d 'content' ]; then LAB_TYPE='showroom-only'; elif [[ "$(basename $PWD)" == zt-* ]]; then LAB_TYPE='zero-touch'; fi; if [ -n "$LAB_TYPE" ]; then echo "{\"continue\":true,\"suppressOutput\":false,\"status\":\"Lab Foundry: detected $LAB_TYPE lab project. /foundry skills available.\"}"; else echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'; fi
